items.title: Buyer Discovery Relevance Release
items.description: Release of Buyer Discovery Relevance improvements aimed at moving Successful buyer transaction rate and Demand-side liquidity contribution, anchored in liquidity and trust while classifieds mix shifts toward professional sellers and services and led through Improve category-aware ranking, filtering, and local-intent relevance. The quarter concentrates on trust, liquidity, and professional-seller quality in local marketplace flows so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase successful buyer transaction rate by strengthening improve category-aware ranking, filtering, and local-intent relevance and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase trust-safe transaction rate by strengthening improve category-aware ranking, filtering, and local-intent relevance and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase demand-side liquidity contribution by strengthening improve category-aware ranking, filtering, and local-intent relevance and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Improve category-aware ranking, filtering, and local-intent relevance.
Improve alert precision and recency handling across saved searches.
Strengthen trust surfaces and listing quality presentation on detail pages.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out relevance and trust improvements on web.
Bring alert and detail-page improvements to iOS.
Bring alert and detail-page improvements to Android.

items.title: Casual Seller Listing Quality Release
items.description: Release of Casual Seller Listing Quality improvements aimed at moving Listing-to-sale realization and Supply liquidity and monetization, anchored in liquidity and trust while classifieds mix shifts toward professional sellers and services and led through Add category-aware listing templates and better draft recovery. The quarter concentrates on trust, liquidity, and professional-seller quality in local marketplace flows so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase listing-to-sale realization by strengthening add category-aware listing templates and better draft recovery and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase spam contact rate by strengthening add category-aware listing templates and better draft recovery and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase supply liquidity and monetization by strengthening add category-aware listing templates and better draft recovery and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Add category-aware listing templates and better draft recovery.
Improve pricing guidance with category comparables and trust explanations.
Simplify relist, reserve, and sold-state handling.

deliveryChannels.change: Launch the revised self-serve listing funnel on web.
Launch photo-first listing updates on iOS.
Launch photo-first listing updates on Android.
